query_normalized: predicting molecular properties from open babel fingerprints with random forests chemistry
rationale: This paper satisfies acceptance criteria (a) and (b): it measures the same mechanism (molecular property prediction using molecular fingerprints and tree-based ensemble ML methods) in the same domain (chemistry), even though it uses Extra Trees instead of Random Forests and QSAR terminology instead of Open Babel fingerprints. QSAR modeling with molecular fingerprints is the canonical alternative-vocabulary cluster for this research area.
